creator: gb@isis.u-strasbg.fr
text:
Yi-Jheng Lin (yzlin@cs.nctu.edu.tw) on 22/09/2008 at 16:18 wrote:
 
 > >Submitter-Id:	current-users
 > >Originator:	Yi-Jheng Lin
 > >Organization:	NCTU CS
 > >Confidential:	no 
 > >Synopsis:	[PATCH] sysutils/tree: update to 1.5.2.1
 > >Severity:	non-critical
 > >Priority:	low
 > >Category:	ports 
 > >Class:		update
 > >Release:	FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE-p4 amd64
 > >Environment:
 > System: FreeBSD stucgi 7.0-RELEASE-p4 FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE-p4 #0: Fri Sep  5 14:56:26 CST
 > >Description:
 > - Update to 1.5.2.1
 > 
 > Removed file(s):
 > - files/patch-tree.c
 
 Hello,
 
 
 Thanks for updating the ports sources to 1.5.2.1. Removing the
 patch-tree.c reintroduced bad output that was observed with 1.5.1.1
 in -CURRENT. I'll try to redo the patch for 1.5.2.1, but feel free to
 get back if you succeed before me.
 
 -- 
   bug
